---
title: "In-class Activities"
subtitle: "STAT 184 — Summer 2026"
---

In-class activities are short individual or group exercises done during class. Lowest activity score is dropped.

## Format

- Assigned during class. Sometimes due at end of class, sometimes by 11:59 p.m. that night.
- Closed-book during class. (When taken home for end-of-day submission, AI policy follows the regular open-assessment rules.)
- Mix of individual and small-group.

## Roughly how many

We will have ~15–20 activities across the six weeks. Specifics depend on day-to-day pacing.

## AI policy

In-class activities: **no AI tools.** Activities that are released to be completed at home (end-of-day) follow the regular open-assessment AI policy.

## Make-ups

Activities require in-class attendance. Make-ups possible but not guaranteed.
